stemHtml: What does this ATC instruction mean: "Fastair 345 standby 118.9 for TOWER"?

options.b: Fastair 345 should tune to 118.9 for aerodrome information broadcasts.
options.c: Fastair 345 should monitor 118.9 and await contact from TOWER.
options.d: Fastair 345 should remain on the current frequency.
